init_db.help: Create or update connector state tables.

check_live.help: Check live dependencies without mutating Seafile or RAGFlow.

sync_once.help: Run one full discovery and synchronization pass.
sync_once.wait_parse: Poll parse status for this many seconds after upload work.

cleanup_orphans.help: Plan or delete connector-owned orphan RAGFlow/OpenWebUI target artifacts.
cleanup_orphans.execute: Delete the planned connector-owned orphan target artifacts.
cleanup_orphans.run_sync: Run sync-once after cleanup so current Seafile libraries are rebuilt.

openwebui.mode: Override OpenWebUI sync mode: disabled, dry-run, sync or repair.
openwebui.mode_error: mode must be disabled, dry-run, sync or repair

demo.fixtures_help: Generate the reproducible local demo file set without contacting services.
demo.cleanup_help: Delete only clearly named local demo artifacts across Seafile, RAGFlow and OpenWebUI.
demo.bootstrap_help: Create the canonical demo libraries and optionally run the connector sync path.
demo.output_dir: Directory where the reproducible demo files are generated.
demo.execute_cleanup: Actually delete safe demo objects. Without this flag only prints the plan.
demo.execute_bootstrap: Actually create libraries and upload files. Without this flag only writes fixtures.
demo.run_sync: Run connector sync-once after uploading demo files.

process.controller: Run the discovery and delta scheduling loop.

check_config.help: Load and validate configuration without contacting external services.

doctor.help: Diagnose local configuration truth and optional state services.
doctor.live: Also check database and Redis reachability.

notes.acl_subfolders: Subfolder permissions are not evaluated separately yet.
notes.acl_share_links: Share links are not included in the ACL snapshot yet.
notes.sync_user_email: Informational only; the sync token controls access.
notes.validate_dataset: Created and bound datasets are always read in the current path.
notes.preserve_filename: Source path and original name are currently always retained as metadata.
notes.reparse: Changed dataset settings do not trigger an automatic reparse yet.
notes.full_sync_fallback: Delta sync always falls back to full sync without a reliable baseline.
notes.archive_dataset: Deleted libraries can currently be retained or deleted, but not archived.
notes.library_concurrency: Concurrency is provided by worker replicas; each worker runs one job serially.
notes.upload_workers: Uploads currently run serially within each worker process.
notes.parse_workers: Parse jobs currently run serially within each worker process.
notes.upload_batch: The current upload path processes files individually.
notes.parse_batch: Parse jobs do not use a configurable batch size yet.
notes.inflight: The inflight limit is not used as a runtime throttle yet.
notes.runtime_path: Used by the container entrypoint for writable runtime paths.
notes.outbound_policy: Documents operational intent; the process does not enforce a network policy.
notes.telemetry: Documents operational intent; the connector currently has no telemetry.

library.status_help: Show the locally known library and cursor state.
library.plan_help: Build a reconciliation plan without remote mutations.
library.sync_help: Queue a persistent delta or full synchronization job.
library.reconcile_help: Plan reconciliation or run it as a fenced repair job.
library.missing: Library {repo_id} is not present in connector state.
library.controlled: Library {repo_id} is {state} and cannot be mutated.

dashboard.help: Run the read-only HTTP dashboard as a foreground process.
dashboard.disabled: Dashboard disabled; set CONNECTOR_DASHBOARD_ENABLED=true to start it

jobs.help: Inspect and control persistent connector jobs.
jobs.list_help: Filter jobs by status and library.
jobs.show_help: Show one job including retries and error state.
jobs.cancel_help: Cancel a queued job or request cooperative cancellation.
jobs.retry_help: Queue a dead or cancelled job again.
jobs.sync_mode_error: SYNC_OPENWEBUI mode must be disabled, dry-run, sync or repair

cleanup.help: Inspect and retry failed target cleanups.
cleanup.list_help: Filter the cleanup outbox by status and library.
cleanup.retry_help: Queue a failed target cleanup again as a persistent job.

settings.language_description: Language for human-readable connector output. Supported: de, en, es, fr, it, pt, nl, pl, tr, uk, zh, ja, ar. Empty or unknown values fall back to German.

product.pipe_description: Auditable Seafile/RAGFlow knowledge model for {dataset} with native citations, locators, and optional evidence table.

sources.heading: Found sources
sources.audit_no_sources: I did not find a sufficiently reliable source.
sources.audit_claim_unknown: Supported claim cannot be determined more precisely
sources.audit_quality_strong: strong - {sources} sources, {precise} concrete locations, {linked} direct links.
sources.audit_quality_medium: medium - {sources} sources, {precise} concrete locations, {linked} direct links.
sources.audit_quality_weak: weak - {sources} sources, but only broad document/chunk evidence.

preview.invalid_token: The preview is unavailable or the link is invalid.
preview.title: Source preview
preview.no_context: RAGFlow did not provide additional before/after context for this source. The hit itself is shown unchanged in the hit tab.
preview.original_missing_hint: This source is missing a repo ID or path, so no Seafile original link can be generated.
preview.evidence_subtitle: Verifiable source from the RAG context
preview.location_hint: Where the hit is located in the document.
preview.used_context_hint: This excerpt was attached to the answer as RAG evidence.
preview.origin_hint: Seafile original and connector preview stay clearly separated.
preview.no_snippet: No evidence excerpt is included in the preview token.
preview.original_external_hint: Opens the original document in Seafile, not this connector preview.
preview.original_link_config_hint: The connector derives original links from SEAFILE_PUBLIC_BASE_URL or SEAFILE_BASE_URL; SEAFILE_FILE_URL_TEMPLATE remains an optional override.
preview.original_connector_link_error: The token contains a connector/preview link instead of a Seafile original.
preview.original_invalid_url_error: The token does not contain a usable http(s) original link.
preview.invalid_token_detail: Check that the link is complete, the token is still valid, and OPENWEBUI_PROXY_SHARED_SECRET is configured.

openwebui_artifact.tls_invalid_return: The TLS configuration of the RAGFlow pipe is invalid.
openwebui_artifact.proxy_timeout_return: The RAGFlow proxy did not respond in time.
openwebui_artifact.query_failed_return: The RAGFlow query could not be executed.
openwebui_artifact.answer_failed_return: The RAGFlow answer could not be created because of an unexpected error.
openwebui_artifact.ragflow_timeout: RAGFlow did not respond in time.
openwebui_artifact.ragflow_timeout_return: RAGFlow did not respond in time.
openwebui_artifact.no_answer: RAGFlow did not return an answer.
